perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a flat cap, glasses, and a grey hoodie with the 'Roots' logo is seen in a talking-head shot against a blurred indoor background. He points his finger and gestures towards the camera. (2) A screen overlay appears showing a LINE account 'Logged Out' notification and a chat interface demonstration on a smartphone being held by hands. (3) The man returns to the center frame, gesturing with both hands while explaining a feature. A green 'Login Again' button is superimposed over his chest. (4) A screen recording shows the LINE app version 15.4.0 in a settings menu. (5) The man finishes his explanation with a final gesture towards the camera as the 'Login Again' button appears one last time.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music starts immediately. A male voice speaks in a professional and energetic tone in Mandarin. (2) Sound effects (digital 'pops' and 'clicks') are heard whenever text or UI buttons appear on the screen. (3) The background music remains constant throughout the video, maintaining a steady rhythm. (4) The vocal density is high, with the speaker providing continuous information until the very end of the clip.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '3c有意思tim哥' and 'miko' (Decorative/Branding text at the top). (2) '你是不是也有過' (Hook: Have you ever had...). (3) '已登出帳號' (Functional: Logged out of account). (4) '導致聊天紀錄流失' (Functional: Leading to loss of chat history). (5) '你是無辜的!' (Emotional: You are innocent!). (6) '再次登入功能' (Functional: Re-login feature). (7) '15.4.0 #含以上' (Technical requirement: 15.4.0 and above). (8) '嘗試重新登入' (Functional: Try to log in again).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Problem Scenarios -> Solution Introduction -> Feature Demonstration -> CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the content.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with short hair, wearing silver-rimmed glasses, a dark grey flat cap, and a grey 'Roots' brand hoodie.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A blurred, neutral-colored indoor setting, possibly an office or studio, with soft ambient lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Problem -> Evidence -> Solution -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a technical tutorial designed to inform LINE messenger users about a new 'Re-login' feature. It addresses a common pain point—losing chat history or having an account hacked after being logged out—and provides a specific software solution (version 15.4.0) to prevent data loss and enhance account security.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The presence of the 'miko' logo in the header throughout the video and the specific branding of the creator '3c有意思tim哥' suggests a content partnership or personal brand endorsement.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The creator uses a signature flat cap and a 'Roots' hoodie, which are consistent visual identifiers for his personal brand.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses fast-paced editing and variety-show style text overlays to maintain viewer engagement during a technical explanation.
